name: serial-mcp
description: Headless MCP server for AI-assisted embedded-board serial log debugging.

interface.shortDescription: Read embedded-board serial logs through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Serial MCP lets Codex inspect ESP32, STM32, and other embedded-board text logs through a read-only FastMCP server. It monitors one or more USB serial ports, stores timestamped lines in a lock-protected ring buffer, exposes query/status tools, and provides a localhost web viewer for human inspection while Codex runs black-box firmware debugging loops.
defaultPrompt: Use Serial MCP to inspect board logs and run a clear, trigger, query debugging loop.
